text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, March 18. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Staying active is key. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Researching rover power systems in depth. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Budget tracking is updated. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: That's wonderful. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Great consistency with running. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the recent logs for that. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: I can help with that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Looking over our mortgage options. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
